review_title: CRM that suits our small business
author: Kateřina P.
pros: Clear workflow, convenient invoicing, pleasant communication with support when needed. The price-performance ratio is okay for me. Overall, we are very satisfied, we have been using eWay for several years.
cons: I liked the older look a little better, but it's nothing that bothers me. Customizing individual steps in the workflow is very detailed and therefore a bit more time-consuming, fortunately it doesn't need to be done very often.

description: Overall, my experience with eWay-CRM has been very positive. It is a practical and user-friendly CRM solution that integrates well with daily workflows and helps keep client communication and project management organized. It is especially useful for teams that need a simple and reliable CRM within their existing work environment.
author: Nataša P.
pros: The system is very easy to use and intuitive. I also appreciate its clear and well-organized interface, which makes it simple to manage contacts, companies, and tasks efficiently
cons: One limitation is that inactive companies or contacts cannot be easily deleted, which can make the database less organized over time.

description: I don´t have much experience. I use eWay to upload information and documents for individual projects so that others can also have access to all these materials and information if necessary.
author: Jana K.
pros: That emails are updated when I add them to the project. I´m also satisfied with the clarity of the information I enter into eWay.
cons: When I want to upload items to a project, it takes a long time and causes the entire eWay system and associated email to freeze.

description: Overall, the experience has been mostly positive. I believe that over time all features will be transferred to the new eWay Online user interface and everything will be perfect.
author: Daniel H.
pros: eWay-CRM Online is clear and well-structured and is fully integrated with the Pohoda accounting system. The mobile app is practical and easy to use.
cons: The need to constantly switch between the old eWay desktop version and the new eWay Online, as not all functions work due to the installation on our server required for the accounting system integration.

description: We use Eway mainly as an overview of opportunities, projects and a contact list. In projects, we generate orders, contracts and other documents from templates. Everything is simple, clear and functional.
author: Michaela L.
pros: What I like most about eWay-CRM is its ease of use. The program is clear, functional, and integrated with Outlook.
cons: I'm not comfortable with customizing templates. Sometimes templates don't get overwritten correctly.

review_title: The Main System for Everyday Work
description: We use eWay on a daily basis. It is our main system in which we record everything related to our company.
author: Alena B.
pros: The way the system works and how all the information and projects are kept together.
cons: Sometimes the system is slow.

description: I like this system because it helps me to keep all imporatnt information at the one place and also offer simple and clear reports
author: Jiří F.
pros: I like clear and well-organized work environment, simple work with filtres and categorizing of all information
cons: I do like least not intuitive creation of new projects and also any other related activities. I also find e-mail management not working as I would expect.

description: I ´m using eWay more than year and I am pretty ok with how it works and what I can do with and how it´s support my work
author: Gabriela L.
pros: I can find all details about customers nad employees. Invoices, orders, contact details and much more.
cons: Options between old and new version. I like the new one but some people do not and then when we try to find something together it is complicated.

review_title: My clever external brain integrated directly into Outlook
description: It serves as a clever 'external brain' within my Outlook, allowing me to offload my tasks and focus on my work without the constant fear of forgetting something important
author: Radomira C.
pros: It is a very clever platform - Outlook integration, offline version. I like the mobile app - it gives me quick access.
cons: The mobile app is limited to read-only access for most features, which makes it more of a quick reference tool than a full workstation for managing data on the go.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: David C.
pros: The collaboration with Outlook is great. Simplicity, intuitiveness, possibilities to adjust the system according to your own needs.
cons: In each version of eWay, you can only do certain steps - the online version is clearer, but you cannot, for example, save emails directly in it.

description: Overall, my experience with eWay-CRM has been very positive. It streamlined our customer and project management processes by integrating directly into Outlook, which made adoption easy for the team. The system is intuitive, customizable, and well-suited for small to mid-sized businesses. Support has been responsive whenever we had questions, and the ongoing updates show that the product is actively maintained and improved. It’s a reliable tool that has helped us stay organized and efficient.
author: Denis J.
pros: I appreciated the seamless integration with Microsoft Outlook, which made it easy to manage emails, tasks, contacts, and sales opportunities in one place. The interface feels familiar, especially for teams already using Microsoft 365. Customizable fields and workflows allowed us to tailor the CRM to our business needs without heavy technical involvement. The mobile app is also a plus for managing information on the go.
cons: Sometimes the initial synchronization between Outlook and the CRM can be a bit slow, especially when dealing with large volumes of data. It's not a major issue, but it can be noticeable during setup or heavy use.

description: It's good, however I'd like to see plugins with other applications such as VOIP systems and other functions.
author: Chris C.
pros: It's straight out of the box, easy to setup unlike most other platforms.
cons: Having time to get to grips with the power of its capabilities.

description: I have experience with other CRM systems too and eWay is easier for modifying forms, adding new downlist and more intuitive for users' work.
author: Robert K.
pros: I like eway-crm mobile app. I have all clients' contacts immediately when I need them or if clients call me I see who it is.
cons: In the mobile version of eWay, there were missing some features that were in the PC version. It limited me in my work, I was in the field.

description: It's the first time ever that I heard positive things about a CRM system from my technical team members. That is HIGH praise.
author: Paul N.
pros: Because eWay is embedded in Outlook, it never gets in your way. You can use it right out of the box and then gradually customize to fit your needs.
cons: The custom workflows are not easy to set up, while on the other hand, we are cautious not to automate too many steps, since one needs to stay in touch with your data.

review_title: Great For Those Who Live In Outlook
description: Super simple to set up, super intuitive design, love that it looks for leads within your own in box, keeps everything organized and is a single source of truth.
author: Marie C.
pros: It is so incredibly easy to use because of its deep connection with outlook. No more missing contacts or loading to a separate system. Great value for the money and perfect for any small business.
cons: Nothing. I have tested everything and cannot find one issue. Other CRMS are too clunky, have too much. This is easy breezy.

description: We have been using the system for about a year within our sales team and are gradually adapting it to our needs with technical support. But it is already making our work much easier.
author: Daniel H.
pros: Integration with MS Outlook, clarity, and easy management. All of this optimizes our internal and external processes and communication within the sales team with minimal effort. As a result, everyone on the team has embraced it and uses it naturally.
cons: I imagine greater flexibility of the system. But that stems from our approach before the introduction of CRM. For optimal configuration of modules and, above all, their relationships, programming of eWay technical support is necessary.

description: Out of so many CRM's used I still believe for our small brokerage this is a great functional & cost-effective solution.
author: Francois S.
pros: Ease of integration between Outlook, calender and Eway. The easy & simple structure make training of new staff easy & quick
cons: Notes on tasks can be deleted / amended by another user Notes doesn't have automated date stamps & time stamps or user that made notes in the tasks. Would love to see intergration with whatsapp & chatgpt

review_title: Great CRM solution for everyday business
description: Overall, I’m very satisfied. eWay-CRM helps us manage our sales process, track communication with clients, and keep projects organized. The customer support is great, and regular updates show that the software is constantly improving.
author: Jana R.
pros: eWay-CRM is very intuitive and easy to use. I really appreciate the Outlook integration and the ability to keep all client and project information in one place. It saves time and makes teamwork much more efficient.
cons: It takes a little time to get familiar with all the features, but once you do, the system works smoothly without any issues.

review_title: Would recomend rather desktop than Online
author: Veronika C.
pros: We have been using eWay since 2009 and have grown accustomed to it. We greatly appreciate the custom reports, as we use them in our daily business operations.
cons: The online version feels overly spread out and modern, which is understandable. However, compared to the desktop version—where everything is clear and regularly sized—I find this to be a drawback. Additionally, many functions behave differently online and are less user-friendly. For example, something as simple as logging attendance now takes longer than on the desktop version. I understand this shift represents the future, but I would appreciate it if the user-friendly features of the desktop version were retained.

review_title: Clear and reliable tool for everyday work
description: Overall I am very satisfied with eWay. The system is clear and easy to navigate, tasks work reliably, and I use it on a daily basis. The only minor issue is slower performance when there are many records in the diary, but everything else is positive.
author: Tereza Š.
pros: What I liked most about eWay CRM is how clear and intuitive it is. The interface is easy to use, tasks and related workflows work reliably, and I can find everything quickly. It helps me stay organized and work efficiently every day.
cons: What I like least about eWay CRM is that it can be a bit slower at times, especially when there are many diary records or several users are working at once. It does not happen often, but in those moments the work feels less smooth.

review_title: Simple CRM that keeps our records clean and traceable
description: eWay-CRM helps me keep customer records, communication, and project data in one controlled place. Since it runs inside Outlook, it’s easy for the team to follow consistent processes without switching tools. The audit trail for emails and tasks makes reviews smoother, and onboarding new users doesn’t take long.
author: Flore K.
pros: The Outlook integration keeps all communication tied to the right client record, which helps with internal audits. Sharing emails, tasks, and documents is straightforward, so it’s easier to track who handled what. Setup is quick, and the automations reduce manual updates.
cons: The online version is not as clear as the desktop app and slows down some checks. Customization takes time for new users, and simple features like creating folders in project documents are still missing.

description: eWay-CRM works well for teams that rely on Outlook. As an IT Manager, I find it easy to roll out and simple for users to learn because it fits right into the tools they already use. Day to day work like sharing emails, tracking tasks, and managing customer info becomes smoother.
author: Bailey K.
pros: I like that it runs directly inside Outlook, so people don’t need to switch apps. Sharing emails, contacts, and project details is quick for the whole team. Setup is fast, and the automations help turn emails into deals or tasks without extra steps.
cons: The online version feels less clear than the desktop app. Customization takes time for users who are not technical. Some simple features, like creating folders inside project documents, are still missing.

description: Overall, together with the newly introduced browser access, I rate it positively and I don't know of such widespread competition as this add-on.
author: Zbynek S.
pros: It is easy to use and very user friendly. I am just a non-power user, but we have been using this add-on as a company for several years without any major problems.
cons: Sometimes it takes a long time for some data to load. However, this may be an internal situation....

description: Neutral or slightly negative. The daily use is IMHO not very convenient, it loads slowly and blocks normal use of Outlook. The menu doesn't include all the modules, so in order to go to Journal, I need to open the whole hub.
author: Daniel K.
pros: Adding an extra level of overview and structure to the conversations. Potentially a way to have one-stop overview for all communications.
cons: Adding extra level of complexity, PC requrements, time to process, time to load. It does not provide any extra value to my work, only requires extra attention and work. But to be fair, a big part of the problem comes with sh*tty Outlook, which fails to do the basic part - working with e-mails.

description: open new company, start offers and opportunities, cycles of project, marketing capaign, assigment of tasks
author: Pavel Z.
pros: Project section and offers and opportunities.
cons: none, I like all.
